content.problemStatement: You are given three non-negative integers XXX, YYY and NNN. Find the number of integers ZZZ such that 0≤Z≤N0 \le Z \le N0≤Z≤N and (X⊕Z)<(Y⊕Z)(X \oplus Z) \lt (Y \oplus Z)(X⊕Z)<(Y⊕Z), where ⊕\oplus⊕ denotes the bitwise XOR operation.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers XXX, YYY and NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ― the number of integers ZZZ which satisfy all conditions.
